assignments.focus: Viewport comparison showing message input fixed at bottom across mobile portrait, mobile landscape, and desktop views. Demonstrate scrollable message area with persistent input field.
assignments.notes: Show side-by-side device frames with varying message counts to prove input stays visible

assignments.focus: Full-page OAuth messaging setup with password and confirm fields. Show 'Save this password' warning placements (above password, below confirm, after success). Include password manager form attributes visualization.
assignments.notes: Emphasize this is full-page NOT modal. Show the three warning placements clearly numbered.

assignments.focus: Message decryption failure states with lock icons and tooltips. Participant name resolution showing display name, username fallback, 'Deleted User', and 'Unknown User' states.
assignments.notes: Show conversation with mixed message states - some decrypted, some showing lock. Include header name resolution examples.
